info.title: CRM Associations Schema
info.x-hubspot-api-use-case: To associate a contact with a company, use this API to get the necessary associationTypeId and associationCategory.
info.x-hubspot-introduction: Use the association schema API to understand how different types of CRM records and activities can relate to one another, as well as define your own custom associations.

get.description: Returns all user configurations available on a given portal

get.summary: Get configs between two object types
get.description: Returns user-defined association configurations for all association definitions between the specified object types.

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for which to retrieve association configurations.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for which to retrieve association configurations.

post.description: Creates multiple user-defined association configurations between the specified object types in a single batch.

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for the batch association configuration creation.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for the batch association configuration creation.

get.description: Returns all association labels for the defined relationship between the specified object types.

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for which to retrieve association labels.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for which to retrieve association labels.

put.description: Updates an existing user-defined association definition between two object types

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for the association label being updated.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for the association label being updated.

post.description: Creates a new user-defined association definition between two object types

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for the association label being created.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for the association label being created.

post.description: Deletes multiple user-defined association configurations between the specified object types in a single batch

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type for the batch association configuration removal.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type for the batch association configuration removal.

delete.description: Deletes the association definition corresponding to the specified association type ID between two object types

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source CRM object type of the association label to remove.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target CRM object type of the association label to remove.

parameters.name: associationTypeId
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the association type label to delete.

post.description: Updates multiple user-defined association configurations between the specified object types in a single batch

parameters.name: fromObjectType
parameters.description: The source object type for the association configuration update.

parameters.name: toObjectType
parameters.description: The target object type for the association configuration update.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation completed.

numErrors.description: Total number of errors encountered in the batch operation.

requestedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation was requested.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation began processing.

links.description: Map of relevant navigational links related to the batch response.

results.description: Array of successfully processed association definition user configurations.

errors.description: Array of standard errors encountered during batch processing.

status.description: Current processing status of the batch operation.

BatchResponsePublicAssociationDefinition.description: Batch response containing association definition user configurations, processing status, and any errors encountered.

inverseLabel.description: Display label for the inverse direction of the association.

name.description: Unique internal name identifying the association definition.

label.description: Human-readable display label for the association definition.

PublicAssociationDefinitionCreateRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new association definition, including its name and display labels.

subCategory.description: Optional object providing additional subcategory classification for the error.

context.description: Key-value map of contextual metadata associated with the error.

links.description: Map of relevant links providing additional error reference resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the error instance.

category.description: High-level category classifying the type of error.

errors.description: List of detailed error information objects.

status.description: The HTTP status description of the error response.

StandardError.description: Structured error object containing category, message, context, and detail information for a failed operation.

inputs.description: List of association specs to include in the batch operation.

BatchInputPublicAssociationSpec.description: Batch input wrapper containing a list of association specs to process.

completedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the batch operation completed.

requestedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the batch operation was requested.

startedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the batch operation started processing.

links.description: Map of relevant link names to associated URIs for the batch response.

results.description: List of association definition configuration update results.

status.description: Current processing status of the batch operation.

BatchResponsePublicAssociationDefinition.description: Batch response containing results and status for association definition configuration update operations.

CollectionResponsePublicAssociationDefin.description: Unpaged collection of association definition user configurations.

userEnforcedMaxToObjectIds.description: Maximum number of target object IDs enforced for this association type.

typeId.description: Numeric identifier of the association type.

category.description: Category indicating who defined the association type.

PublicAssociationDefinitionConfiguration.description: Result of an association definition configuration update, including type, category, and enforced limits.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate
message.example: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

Error.description: Standard error object containing message, category, correlation ID, and contextual details.

typeId.description: Numeric identifier of the association type to update.

category.description: The category of the association definition to update.

maxToObjectIds.description: Maximum number of target objects allowed in this association.

PublicAssociationDefinitionConfiguration.description: Request payload for updating an association definition configuration, specifying type, category, and object limit.

typeId.description: The numeric ID of the association type to configure.

category.description: The category of the association definition to configure.

maxToObjectIds.description: Maximum number of target objects allowed in this association.

PublicAssociationDefinitionConfiguration.description: Request body for creating a configuration for an association definition, specifying its type, category, and object limit.

inverseLabel.description: The inverse label for the reverse direction of the association.

associationTypeId.description: The numeric ID of the association type to update.

label.description: The display label for the association definition. Nullable.

PublicAssociationDefinitionUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating an association definition's label and optional inverse label.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

ErrorDetail.description: Detailed error information including message, code, field location, category, and remediation context.

typeId.description: The numeric ID identifying the association type.

label.description: The display label for the association type. Nullable.

category.description: The category classifying the origin of the association type.

AssociationSpecWithLabel.description: An association type specification including its numeric ID, category, and optional display label.

results.description: Array of association type specifications returned in the response.

CollectionResponseAssociationSpecWithLab.description: A non-paginated collection of association type specifications with labels.

userEnforcedMaxToObjectIds.description: User-enforced maximum number of target objects. Nullable.

typeId.description: The numeric ID identifying the association type.

label.description: Custom display label for the association definition.

category.description: The origin category of the association definition: HubSpot-defined, user-defined, or integrator-defined.

PublicAssociationDefinitionUserConfigura.description: User-defined configuration for an association definition, including type, category, label, and enforced object limit.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation completed.

BatchResponsePublicAssociationDefinition.description: Batch response containing user configuration details for multiple association definitions, including processing status and timestamps.

inputs.description: Array of association definition configuration update requests to process in batch.

BatchInputPublicAssociationDefinitionCon.description: Batch input payload containing a list of association definition configuration update requests.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch update operation completed.

numErrors.description: Total number of errors encountered during the batch operation.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch update operation started processing.

inputs.description: Array of association definition configuration create requests to process in batch.
